noDurableFieldsReason: CP5 adds route vocabulary and public reducer-entrypoint route evidence only; no new durable BattleState field is introduced. Existing BattleState owners continue to own active effects, concentration, HP, temporary HP, movement, turn-boundary, and spell-attack procedure state.
